short_description: Download & Save Sextu Videos Easily for Offline Viewing (Browser Extension)
long_description: Sextu Downloader is a browser extension that detects and downloads video media from SexTu and associated FullVideoPorn pages. It works by monitoring browser-network activity during playback and capturing the exposed media for local export. No bypass capabilities are claimed — only media you can already access and have permission to save is targeted.

faqs.question: Is Sextu Downloader available in browser extension stores?
faqs.answer: Store listings are not confirmed. The extension is distributed through GitHub Releases for manual installation.

faqs.question: Does it work on all Sextu pages?
faqs.answer: The extension targets declared host patterns for Sextu and FullVideoPorn. Some pages may not expose media in a detectable way.

faqs.question: Can I download multiple videos at once?
faqs.answer: The extension handles one download at a time. Complete the current download before starting another.

faqs.question: Is an internet connection required?
faqs.answer: Yes, the extension needs an active connection to detect media sources and process downloads.

faqs.question: What happens after the free trial?
faqs.answer: After 3 free downloads, you can purchase a license for unlimited use. No credit card is needed to start the trial.

why: Finding and saving video content from adult platforms can be frustrating when built-in download options are missing or limited. Many sites stream media in a way that makes local archiving difficult without third-party tools that often feel unreliable or unsafe.

Sextu Downloader solves this by providing a dedicated browser extension that detects media during normal playback on supported pages. It works with the content you are already viewing and exports it as MP4 files, giving you a straightforward way to keep copies for offline access or personal archives without relying on external software.
how_it_works: Install the extension from the latest release.
Open Sextu or FullVideoPorn and go to a supported video page.
Start playback so the extension can detect the media.
Open the popup or use the on-page controls.
Choose the quality option you want.
Start the download and wait for the MP4 export to finish.
tutorial: Install the extension by downloading the correct build from the latest release page.
Navigate to a supported video page on Sextu or FullVideoPorn.
Press play and let the video start streaming in your browser.
Click the extension icon in your browser toolbar to open the popup.
Wait for available media sources to be detected and listed.
Select your preferred quality option from the detected variants.
Click the download button and let the export process complete.
Choose a save location and confirm the file download.

troubleshooting: Extension does not detect any media Make sure the video is actively playing in the browser tab. Some pages only expose media sources after playback has started.
Download fails or file is incomplete Check your internet connection and try again. If the issue persists, try refreshing the page and restarting playback.
Popup does not appear Confirm the extension is installed and enabled. Try reloading the page and clicking the extension icon again.
No quality options are shown Only variants detected during browser-network activity are listed. If only one source is found, that is the only option available.
Download takes too long Larger files may take longer depending on your connection speed and the source server. Ensure you have enough storage space.
